entities: Ormeus Coin; John Barksdale; JonAtina Barksdale
reported_metric: SEC said Ormeus Coin was offered and sold to investors on crypto trading platforms
market_health_signal: Token sales carried issuer reserve and mining claims into markets

reported_metric: DOJ said Ormeus Global raised at least 70 million USD from more than 8000 investors
market_health_signal: MLM-style packages expanded investor exposure to token claims

reported_metric: DOJ said Ormeus Coin market capitalization peaked around 52 million USD
market_health_signal: Market value was linked to mining-backed promotional claims

reported_metric: DOJ described a 250 million USD cryptocurrency mining farm claim in public advertising
market_health_signal: Large asset-backing claims require direct operational proof

reported_metric: SEC said mining operations were abandoned after less than 3 million USD in total mining revenue
market_health_signal: Claimed monthly revenue did not reconcile to total mining output

event: Third-party wallet displayed as reserve signal
reported_metric: SEC said a public website displayed an unrelated wallet above 190 million USD while Ormeus wallets were below 500000 USD
market_health_signal: Reserve display required wallet ownership and control verification

reported_metric: SEC charged a more than 124 million USD crypto fraud operation and alleged Ormeus Coin price manipulation
market_health_signal: Reserve and price-support claims became market-integrity issues

reported_metric: DOJ charged John Barksdale and said Ormeus Coin was sold to about 12000 investors including at least 200 U.S. investors
market_health_signal: Broad token distribution increased market impact of false backing claims
